title: Rāhatgarh Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Rāhatgarh with a Z-Score of +4.37. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Rāhatgarh is causing significant discomfort with a relative humidity of 24% and wind speed of 12.5 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 14.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under strain due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
